title: AI Brain Fry
subtitle: Mental Fatigue and the Impact of AI Oversight on Worker Well-being

source_info.Source Name: BCG Henderson Institute / Harvard Business Review

items.label: Fatigue reduction in work-life balance cultures
Fatigue reduction when managers answer AI questions
Fatigue increase when AI is perceived as 'more work'
Fatigue increase in 'figure it out yourself' cultures

items.a: Reduces burnout by 15% by offloading repetitive toil.
items.b: Causes brain fry by raising output expectations without removing work.

items.a: Decreases emotional exhaustion and improves social connection.
items.b: Layers oversight, monitoring, and verification on existing work.

content_blocks.title: Principles for Sustainable AI Tool Design
points: Support mind wandering to facilitate diffuse thinking where insight and creativity occur.
Foster social engagement to protect users against cognitive and emotional depletion.
Scaffold skill development to build human capacity rather than simply substituting for it.
Design for neurobiology and sustainable value rather than just speed and throughput.
